name: Method Classification review for Acceptable Use Operational Training Augmentation Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The update preserves method distinctions across LLM-generated operational Writing responses, Qwen-generated formative communication-skills responses, GPT-generated classroom NGSS explanations, and mismatched real operational spoken responses used as constructed off-topic cases.

findings.claim_or_issue: The four added sources do not all use the same kind of synthetic response generation.
findings.why_it_matters: Acceptable-use categories should not collapse LLM generation, data corruption, simulation, and mismatched real-response construction into one method claim.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the staged source-specific labels and limitations rather than generalizing across generation methods.
